body:
sleeplessv0id:

does anyone else love stickers but never use them because you’re too afraid to waste them.

This is a hard decision, where do I want this sticker to be *forever*!!!!
reblog_comment: This is a hard decision, where do I want this sticker to be *forever*!!!!
